{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Skysworn Truegolds
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Bai Rou]] is the twenty-eighth among the [[Skysworn Truegolds]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c22">''Blackflame'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
